title: Contact | Jess Phillips - Labour MP for Birmingham Yardley
text_excerpt: Contact | Jess Phillips - Labour MP for Birmingham Yardley Skip to main content Toggle navigation Main navigation Home Contact News Contact Contact Details Telephone: 0121 708 2412 Email: jess@jessphillips.net Write: House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Office Opening Following the recent security advice for MPs, meetings with the Jess and casework team will be by appointment only. You can get in touch using the contact details to book a convenient time. Please note, due to strict Parliamentary protocol MPs can only take on cases for residents living in their constituency.
